decision_metric_contract: runtime decisions use raw integer scores; basis-point metrics are report/render only

invariants.description: All L1/L2/L3 and world-model phase coordinates must stay inside the Q256 residue class.
invariants.formula: forall x in runtime_state: 0 <= x < N, N = 2^256
invariants.name: Q256_Bounded_Phases

invariants.description: Protected serialization rejects floats so no float value can enter trace/export evidence.
invariants.name: No_Float_In_Protected_Serialization

invariants.description: L1 sensory observations may mutate only the L1 surface and may not create L2/L3 facts.
invariants.formula: L1_observation(o) => Delta(L1) and not Delta(L2) and not Delta(L3)
invariants.name: L1_Updates_L1_Only

invariants.description: No L1 observation path can call fact commit, L2 fact commit, or L3 semantic commit authority.
invariants.formula: L1 path not -> memory.commit and not -> body.commit_l2_fact and not -> commit_l3_semantic_state
invariants.name: L1_Cannot_Commit_Facts

invariants.description: Separated L2 working memory must expose clean active semantics by subtracting the accumulated episode tag mass.
invariants.name: Separated_L2_Clean_State

invariants.description: Same-key supersession must replace the previous active residual instead of accumulating lifetime phase mass.
invariants.formula: commit(k,v2) after commit(k,v1) => active_L2 = residual(v2), record(v1)=SUPERSEDED
invariants.name: L2_Same_Key_Supersession_Reverses_Residual

invariants.description: L3 semantic state can contribute candidates only; answer authority remains proof/policy/evidence gated.
invariants.formula: L3_state not -> external_answer and L3_state not -> real_action
invariants.name: L3_Cannot_Authorize_Alone

invariants.description: Q256 world model predicts transitions and errors only; it cannot commit facts to memory.
invariants.formula: WorldModel not -> memory.commit and not -> body.commit_l2_fact and not -> trace-authorized fact
invariants.name: World_Model_No_Fact_Commit

invariants.description: Planner and habitat gate must hard-block every real-world action path in this release.
invariants.name: Planner_Blocks_Real_Actions

invariants.description: Every external answer must pass theorem authorization and policy evaluation with evidence linkage.
invariants.formula: Answer => ProofGate and PolicyGate and Evidence-linked result
invariants.name: Answer_Requires_Proof_Policy_Evidence

invariants.description: Runtime transitions must leave tamper-evident protected trace evidence.
invariants.name: Transitions_Append_Protected_Trace

invariants.description: Export/restore must preserve protected trace hash-chain verifiability.
invariants.name: Export_Restore_Preserves_Hash_Chain

invariants.description: World and closed-loop action selection must use raw integer scores, never basis-point report metrics.
invariants.formula: action_selection = argmin(EFE_raw); BP metrics are render-only
invariants.name: No_Normalized_Decision_Core

invariants.description: The protected runtime default modulus must remain Q256, not legacy Q16.
invariants.name: Q256_Default_Modulus

invariants.description: L3 candidate-rule promotion may store only provisional semantic rules and must never grant direct answer, fact-commit, or real-action authority.
invariants.formula: L3RuleCandidate -> ProvisionalRule only; not Answer and not L2Fact and not RealAction
invariants.name: L3_Rule_Promotion_No_Authority_Leak

invariants.description: Hardware claims must be limited to explicit uint256 arithmetic-model verification, with no FPGA/ASIC board-measurement claim.
invariants.formula: P19 => hardware_claim_status = arithmetic_model_verified and board_measurement_status = not_board_measured
invariants.name: Hardware_Claim_Arithmetic_Model_Only
